title: cacalia koualapensis
intro: Cacalia koualapensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Kaua'i cacalia or Kauai's mountain cabbage. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cacalia koualapensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
